input.prompt: I want to build a real-time collaborative dashboard where users can see live updates. What .NET project templates could work? I need you to search available templates and show me the top 3 options with their key parameters.

data.content: I want to build a real-time collaborative dashboard where users can see live updates. What .NET project templates could work? I need you to search available templates and show me the top 3 options with their key parameters.
data.transformedContent:
<current_datetime>2026-05-02T00:51:54.033Z</current_datetime>

I want to build a real-time collaborative dashboard where users can see live updates. What .NET project templates could work? I need you to search available templates and show me the top 3 options with their key parameters.

input.initialPrompt: I want to build a real-time collaborative dashboard where users can see live updates. What .NET project templates could work? I need you to search available templates and show me the top 3 options with their key parameters.

data.reasoningText: The user wants to find .NET project templates that could work for a real-time collaborative dashboard. Let me search for available .NET templates using `dotnet new list` or similar commands.

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "dotnet new list --tag web 2>/dev/null | head -60", "description": "List .NET web project templates", "initial_wait": 15}

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "dotnet new webapi --help 2>/dev/null | tail -40", "description": "Web API template parameters", "initial_wait": 10}

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "dotnet new web --help 2>/dev/null | tail -30", "description": "Empty web template parameters", "initial_wait": 10}

toolResult.textResultForLlm:
None         No interactivity (static server rendering only)
                                             Server       Runs on the server
                                             WebAssembly  Runs in the browser using WebAssembly
                                             Auto         Uses Server while downloading WebAssembly assets, then uses 
                                           WebAssembly
                                           Default: Server
  -e, --empty                              Configures whether to omit sample pages and styling that demonstrate basic 
                                           usage patterns.
                                           Type: bool
                                           Default: false
  -au, --auth <Individual|None>            The type of authentication to use
                                           Type: choice
                                             None        No authentication
                                             Individual  Individual authentication
                                           Default: None
  -uld, --use-local-db                     Whether to use LocalDB instead of SQLite. This option only applies if --auth 
                                           Individual is specified.
                                           Type: bool
                                           Default: false
  -ai, --all-interactive                   Configures whether to make every page interactive by applying an interactive 
                                           render mode at the top level. If false, pages will use static server 
                                           rendering by default, and can be marked interactive on a per-page or 
                                           per-component basis.
                                           Enabled if: (InteractivityPlatform != "None")
                                           Type: bool
                                           Default: false
  --no-https                               Whether to turn off HTTPS. This option only applies if Individual isn't used 
                                           for --auth.
                                           Type: bool
                                           Default: false
  --use-program-main                       Whether to generate an explicit Program class and Main method instead of 
                                           top-level statements.
                                           Type: bool
                                           Default: false
  --localhost-tld                          Whether to combine the project name with the .dev.localhost TLD in the 
                                           application URL for local development, e.g. 
                                           https://myapp.dev.localhost:12345.
                                           Type: bool
                                           Default: false
<exited with exit code 0>

toolResult.textResultForLlm:
Individual or --auth IndividualB2C is specified.
                                           Type: bool
                                           Default: false
  -f, --framework <net11.0|net10.0|...>    The target framework for the project.
                                           Type: choice
                                             net11.0  
                                             net10.0  Target net10.0
                                             net9.0   Target net9.0
                                             net8.0   Target net8.0
                                           Default: net11.0
  --no-restore                             If specified, skips the automatic restore of the project on create.
                                           Type: bool
                                           Default: false
  --called-api-url <called-api-url>        URL of the API to call from the web app. This option only applies if --auth 
                                           SingleOrg or --auth IndividualB2C is specified.
                                           Type: string
                                           Default: https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0
  --calls-graph                            Specifies if the web app calls Microsoft Graph. This option only applies if 
                                           --auth SingleOrg is specified.
                                           Type: bool
                                           Default: false
  --called-api-scopes <called-api-scopes>  Scopes to request to call the API from the web app. This option only applies 
                                           if --auth SingleOrg or --auth IndividualB2C is specified.
                                           Type: string
                                           Default: user.read
  --no-openapi                             Disable OpenAPI (Swagger) support
                                           Type: bool
                                           Default: false
  --use-program-main                       Whether to generate an explicit Program class and Main method instead of 
                                           top-level statements.
                                           Type: bool
                                           Default: false
  -controllers, --use-controllers          Whether to use controllers instead of minimal APIs. This option overides the 
                                           value specified by --minimal.
                                           Type: bool
                                           Default: false

To see help for other template languages (F#), use --language option:
   dotnet new webapi -h --language F#
<exited with exit code 0>

                                             net9.0   Target net9.0
                                             net8.0   Target net8.0
                                           Default: net11.0
  --no-restore                             If specified, skips the automatic restore of the project on create.
                                           Type: bool
                                           Default: false
  --called-api-url <called-api-url>        URL of the API to call from the web app. This option only applies if --auth 
                                           SingleOrg or --auth IndividualB2C is specified.
                                           Type: string
                                           Default: https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0
  --calls-graph                            Specifies if the web app calls Microsoft Graph. This option only applies if 
                                           --auth SingleOrg is specified.
                                           Type: bool
                                           Default: false
  --called-api-scopes <called-api-scopes>  Scopes to request to call the API from the web app. This option only applies 
                                           if --auth SingleOrg or --auth IndividualB2C is specified.
                                           Type: string
                                           Default: user.read
  --no-openapi                             Disable OpenAPI (Swagger) support
                                           Type: bool
                                           Default: false
  --use-program-main                       Whether to generate an explicit Program class and Main method instead of 
                                           top-level statements.
                                           Type: bool
                                           Default: false
  -controllers, --use-controllers          Whether to use controllers instead of minimal APIs. This option overides the 
                                           value specified by --minimal.
                                           Type: bool
                                           Default: false

To see help for other template languages (F#), use --language option:
   dotnet new webapi -h --language F#
<exited with exit code 0>

data.content:
Here are the **top 3 templates** for a real-time collaborative dashboard (all support SignalR for live updates):

---

### 1. 🏆 `blazor` — Blazor Web App *(Best fit)*
Built-in real-time UI with SignalR under the hood.

| Parameter | Values | Default |
|-----------|--------|---------|
| `-int` (interactivity) | `None`, `Server`, `WebAssembly`, `Auto` | `Server` |
| `-ai` (all-interactive) | `true`/`false` | `false` |
| `-au` (auth) | `None`, `Individual` | `None` |
| `-e` (empty) | `true`/`false` | `false` |

```bash
dotnet new blazor -int Server -ai true -n MyDashboard
```

---

### 2. `webapi` — ASP.NET Core Web API
Backend-only; pair with a JS frontend + SignalR hub for push updates.

| Parameter | Values | Default |
|-----------|--------|---------|
| `-controllers` | `true`/`false` | `false` (minimal APIs) |
| `-au` (auth) | `None`, `Individual`, `SingleOrg`, etc. | `None` |
| `-f` (framework) | `net11.0`, `net10.0`, `net9.0`, `net8.0` | `net11.0` |
| `--no-openapi` | `true`/`false` | `false` |

```bash
dotnet new webapi -n MyDashboardApi
```

---

### 3. `web` — ASP.NET Core Empty
Minimal starting point — full control to add SignalR hubs and static files yourself.

| Parameter | Values | Default |
|-----------|--------|---------|
| `-f` (framework) | `net11.0`, `net10.0`, `net9.0`, `net8.0` | `net11.0` |
| `--no-https` | `true`/`false` | `false` |
| `--use-program-main` | `true`/`false` | `false` |

```bash
dotnet new web -n MyDashboard
```

---

**Recommendation:** Go with **`blazor -int Server`** — it uses SignalR natively for real-time UI updates, making it ideal for a collaborative dashboard without extra wiring.
